title: q@ra' #7123
definition:
1) to call, read aloud, read out, shout
    1a) (P'al)
        1a1) to call, proclaim
        1a2) to read aloud, read out
    1b) (Ithp'el) to be summoned, be called

    NASB:  to call, read out or aloud
